name: yxlink-waf
description: OctoBus package for YXLink WAF tamper resistance and intrusion log APIs.

YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/ListTamperSi.description: List YXLink WAF tamper resistance sites.

YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/CreateTamper.name: create-tamper-site
YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/CreateTamper.description: Create a YXLink WAF tamper resistance site.

YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/UpdateTamper.name: update-tamper-site
YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/UpdateTamper.description: Update a YXLink WAF tamper resistance site.

YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/DeleteTamper.name: delete-tamper-sites
YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/DeleteTamper.description: Delete YXLink WAF tamper resistance sites.

YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/CountIntrusi.name: count-intrusion-logs
YXLink_WAF.YXLinkWafService/CountIntrusi.description: Count intrusion logs for a date.
